title: Bee Removal in Bronxville, NY | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional bee removal services in Bronxville, Westchester. Safe, humane bee hive extraction from homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call today for $350-$550 service.
intro: Best Pest Control NYC provides expert bee removal services throughout Bronxville, ensuring the safe and humane extraction of bee colonies from your property. Our licensed technicians understand the unique challenges of bee infestations in Westchester's suburban setting and respond quickly to protect your family and home. With transparent pricing from $350 to $550, we deliver reliable solutions tailored to Bronxville residents.
whyUs: We combine over 15 years of pest control experience with specialized bee removal expertise specific to Bronxville's mix of historic homes and modern properties. Our team prioritizes humane relocation methods whenever possible and guarantees complete hive removal to prevent future infestations.
localContext: Bronxville's tree-lined streets, Tudor and Colonial-style homes, and proximity to the Bronx River Parkway create ideal habitats for bee colonies in eaves, chimneys, and mature landscaping. From properties near Lawrence Park to homes along Pondfield Road, we're familiar with the architectural features that commonly attract bee activity in this charming village.

faqs.question: How much does bee removal cost in Bronxville?
faqs.answer: Our bee removal services in Bronxville range from $350 to $550, depending on the location and size of the hive, accessibility, and whether the colony is in a wall, attic, chimney, or exterior area. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing before any work begins.

faqs.question: Do you remove bee hives humanely?
faqs.answer: Yes, whenever possible we prioritize live bee relocation and work with local beekeepers to rehome colonies safely. For honey bees, we extract the entire hive including comb and bees to preserve the colony while eliminating the infestation from your Bronxville property.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a bee problem in Bronxville?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service for bee removal throughout Bronxville and Westchester County. Because bee swarms and active hives can pose safety risks, especially during warmer months, we prioritize rapid response to protect your family and neighbors.

faqs.question: Will bees return after removal?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive bee removal includes complete hive extraction, honeycomb removal, and thorough cleaning to eliminate pheromones that attract new colonies. We also seal entry points and provide preventative recommendations to ensure bees don't return to the same location in your Bronxville home.
